name: livedet
description: Live Detection System - Flask Backend, WebSocket Server & React Frontend

scripts.start: concurrently "cd frontend && npm run dev" "cd backend && ..\.venv\Scripts\python app.py" "cd backend && ..\.venv\Scripts\python live_ws.py"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && pip install -r requirements.txt && cd ../frontend && npm install
